# Test Feature

**Type:** feature
**Project:** test-project
**Platform:** backend
**Status:** planning
**Created:** 2026-02-02

## Problem

This is a test PRD for validation testing.

## Goal

Verify that PRD validation works correctly.

## User Stories

- As a developer, I want to test PRD validation so that I can ensure the workflow works correctly

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] PRD validation passes for complete PRDs
- [ ] Tests can verify required sections

## Scope

### Included
- Test PRD validation

### Excluded
- Actual implementation

## Approach

Use this PRD as a fixture for testing.

## Risks & Considerations

- None - this is a test fixture
